{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Ruby's manifestation
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A red-haired version of [[Yerin]] with six [[sword]]-arms appears.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
